positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for lunch_conclusion.pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u40,axiom,
    ~appears_in_company(james)).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    ~is_manager(james)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    ~is_manager(X0) | ~works_remotely(X0)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    employee(james)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~employee(X0) | has_lunch_at_home(X0) | has_lunch_in_building(X0)).

cnf(u47,axiom,
    works_remotely(james)).

cnf(u49,negated_conjecture,
    has_lunch_at_home(james)).

cnf(u36,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_lunch_in_building(james)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~has_lunch_at_home(X0) | ~has_lunch_in_building(X0) | ~employee(X0)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~employee(X0) | works_remotely(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define schedules_meeting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define goes_to_building(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
